title: Announcement
description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) announces the election schedule.
details: The Model Code of Conduct comes into effect immediately. The announcement details the phases of the election, dates of voting, and the counting day.

title: Nomination
description: Candidates file their nomination papers with the Returning Officer.
details: Candidates must submit details about their assets, criminal records (if any), and educational qualifications. Papers are scrutinized, and candidates can withdraw within a specified period.

title: Campaigning
description: Political parties and candidates campaign to win voters' support.
details: Campaigning stops 48 hours before the end of polling (silence period) to allow voters to think peacefully.

title: Voting
description: Voters cast their votes using Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs).
details: Voters must verify their names on the electoral roll and carry valid ID proof to the polling booth.

title: Counting & Results
description: Votes are counted under strict security and results are declared.
details: The candidate with the most votes in a constituency wins. If a party or coalition gets a majority in the house, they form the government.
